title: [Straight and Arrow]
description: Heavy iron filigree supports set with small candle cups frame the pale grey silk sidewalls of this domed octagonal shop.  Bright sunlight filters through the thin fabric and the open doorway.  A small carved haon rack displays several fletching razors, and a nearby blue thanot case features a variety of colorful feathers that can be trimmed to adorn arrows.  Fragrant boughs of bay laurel twined with draping clusters of violet wisteria loop from strut to strut in a scalloping valance.
